Areas of focus

Three areas of focus.

Full-Service

Whole-Home Design

Space planning through furnishing, for a single room or an entire house.

Kitchen & Bath

Kitchens & Baths

Layout, materials, and fixtures for kitchens and bathrooms.

Built-In

Architectural Millwork & Built-Ins

Custom cabinetry, shelving, trim, and joinery, built for a specific room and use.

Approach

Architecture and interiors, considered together.

Cabinetry, finishes, and furniture are planned as one system rather than separate decisions — the same attention given to a built-in as to a sofa.

Services

What I do.

Full-service interior design, from a single built-in to a whole-home renovation — each project follows the same process from concept to installation.

01

Full-Service Interior Design

Whole-home or single-room design, from space planning through furnishing.

Space PlanningFurnitureLightingTextiles

02

Kitchens & Baths

Layout, cabinetry, materials, and fixtures for kitchens and bathrooms.

Layout & Space PlanningCabinetryMaterials & FinishesFixtures

03

Architectural Millwork & Built-Ins

Custom cabinetry, shelving, trim, and joinery, designed for a specific room and use.

CabinetryShelving & TrimClosetsCustom Joinery

04

New Construction & Renovation Collaboration

Collaboration with architects, builders, and contractors from early drawings through finish selections.

Architect CoordinationFinish SchedulesSite Visits

05

Styling & Furnishing

Sourcing and placement of furniture, art, and textiles to finish a room.

SourcingArt & ObjectsInstall Day Styling

Process

How a project moves.

01

Discovery

A walkthrough of the space, budget, and timeline.

02

Concept & Drawings

Layout options and material direction.

03

Materials & Specification

Finishes, fixtures, and furnishings selected and priced.

04

Documentation for Trades

Drawings and specifications for builders and cabinetmakers.

05

Install & Styling

Furniture placed and final details set.

About

About the studio.

I'm the designer behind Interior Design Company, offering full-service interior design for whole homes, single rooms, and new construction.

Projects run from initial space planning through final furnishings, with particular depth in kitchens, baths, and custom millwork.

Based in the Northeast, I take on projects across the country and abroad.
